<p dir="auto"><strong>OpenHarness</strong> delivers core lightweight agent infrastructure: tool-use, skills, memory, and multi-agent coordination.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Join the community</strong>: contribute <strong>Harness</strong> for open agent development.</p>

<p dir="auto">One Command (<strong>oh</strong>) to Launch <strong>OpenHarness</strong> and Unlock All Agent Harnesses.</p>
<p dir="auto">Supports CLI agent integration including OpenClaw, nanobot, Cursor, and more.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤔 What is an Agent Harness?</h2><a id="user-content--what-is-an-agent-harness" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤔 What is an Agent Harness?" href="#-what-is-an-agent-harness"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">An <strong>Agent Harness</strong> is the complete infrastructure that wraps around an LLM to make it a functional agent. The model provides intelligence; the harness provides <strong>hands, eyes, memory, and safety boundaries</strong>.</p>
<p align="center" dir="auto">
  <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="/HKUDS/OpenHarness/blob/main/assets/harness-equation.png"><img src="/HKUDS/OpenHarness/raw/main/assets/harness-equation.png" alt="Harness = Tools + Knowledge + Observation + Action + Permissions" width="700" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
</p>
<p dir="auto">OpenHarness is an open-source Python implementation designed for <strong>researchers, builders, and the community</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Understand</strong> how production AI agents work under the hood</li>
<li><strong>Experiment</strong> with cutting-edge tools, skills, and agent coordination patterns</li>
<li><strong>Extend</strong> the harness with custom plugins, providers, and domain knowledge</li>
<li><strong>Build</strong> specialized agents on top of proven architecture</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<p dir="auto">The fastest way to get started — a single command handles OS detection, dependency checks, and installation:</p>

<p dir="auto">The script will:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Detect your OS (Linux / macOS / WSL)</li>
<li>Verify Python ≥ 3.10 and Node.js ≥ 18</li>
<li>Install OpenHarness via <code>pip</code></li>
<li>Set up the React TUI (<code>npm install</code>) if Node.js is available</li>
<li>Create <code>~/.openharness/</code> config directory</li>
<li>Confirm with <code>oh --version</code></li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Prerequisites</h3><a id="user-content-prerequisites" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Prerequisites" href="#prerequisites"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Clone and install</span>
git clone https://github.com/HKUDS/OpenHarness.git
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> OpenHarness
uv sync --extra dev

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Example: use Kimi as the backend</span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://api.moonshot.cn/anthropic
<span class="pl-k">export</span> ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_kimi_api_key
<span class="pl-k">export</span> ANTHROPIC_MODEL=kimi-k2.5

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Launch</span>
oh                    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> if venv is activated</span>
uv run oh             <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> without activating venv</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

cd OpenHarness
uv sync --extra dev

# Example: use Kimi as the backend

export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_kimi_api_key
export ANTHROPIC_MODEL=kimi-k2.5

# Launch
oh                    # if venv is activated
uv run oh             # without activating venv" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Configure A Workflow</h3><a id="user-content-configure-a-workflow" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Configure A Workflow" href="#configure-a-workflow"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Use the unified setup flow instead of manually thinking about <code>auth -> provider -> model</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>uv run oh setup</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="uv run oh setup" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto"><code>oh setup</code> walks through:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Choose a workflow:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Anthropic-Compatible API</code></li>
<li><code>Claude Subscription</code></li>
<li><code>OpenAI-Compatible API</code></li>
<li><code>Codex Subscription</code></li>
<li><code>GitHub Copilot</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>For compatible API families, choose a concrete backend preset</li>
<li>If needed, authenticate the selected workflow</li>
<li>Pick or confirm the model</li>
<li>Save and activate the profile</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Compatible API families currently guide you through presets such as:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Anthropic-Compatible API</code>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Claude official</li>
<li>Moonshot / Kimi</li>
<li>Zhipu / GLM</li>
<li>MiniMax</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>OpenAI-Compatible API</code>:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>OpenAI official</li>
<li>OpenRouter</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Arbitrary compatible endpoints are still supported through advanced profile commands:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>oh provider add my-endpoint \
  --label <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>My Endpoint<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  --provider anthropic \
  --api-format anthropic \
  --auth-source anthropic_api_key \
  --model my-model \
  --base-url https://example.com/anthropic</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="oh provider add my-endpoint \
  --label "My Endpoint" \
  --provider anthropic \
  --api-format anthropic \
  --auth-source anthropic_api_key \
  --model my-model \
  --base-url https://example.com/anthropic" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

<p dir="auto">OpenHarness stores API-key-backed compatible profiles with profile-scoped credentials when appropriate, so different compatible endpoints do not have to share one global key.</p>
<p align="center" dir="auto">
  <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="/HKUDS/OpenHarness/blob/main/assets/landing.png"><img src="/HKUDS/OpenHarness/raw/main/assets/landing.png" alt="OpenHarness Landing Screen" width="700" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Non-Interactive Mode (Pipes & Scripts)</h3><a id="user-content-non-interactive-mode-pipes--scripts" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Non-Interactive Mode (Pipes & Scripts)" href="#non-interactive-mode-pipes--scripts"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>oh setup
oh provider list
oh provider use <span class="pl-k"><</span>profile<span class="pl-k">></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

oh provider list
oh provider use <profile>" tabindex="0" role="button">

</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>GitHub Copilot</strong></td>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Advanced Profile Management</h3><a id="user-content-advanced-profile-management" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Advanced Profile Management" href="#advanced-profile-management"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> List saved workflows</span>
oh provider list

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Switch the active workflow</span>
oh provider use codex

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Add your own compatible endpoint</span>
oh provider add my-endpoint \
  --label <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>My Endpoint<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  --provider openai \
  --api-format openai \
  --auth-source openai_api_key \
  --model my-model \
  --base-url https://example.com/v1</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# List saved workflows
oh provider list

# Switch the active workflow
oh provider use codex

# Add your own compatible endpoint
oh provider add my-endpoint \
  --label "My Endpoint" \
  --provider openai \
  --api-format openai \
  --auth-source openai_api_key \
  --model my-model \
  --base-url https://example.com/v1" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">For custom compatible endpoints, OpenHarness can bind credentials per profile instead of forcing every Anthropic-compatible or OpenAI-compatible backend to share the same API key.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">GitHub Copilot Format (<code>--api-format copilot</code>)</h3><a id="user-content-github-copilot-format---api-format-copilot" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: GitHub Copilot Format (--api-format copilot)" href="#github-copilot-format---api-format-copilot"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Use your existing GitHub Copilot subscription as the LLM backend. Authentication uses GitHub's OAuth device flow — no API keys needed.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> One-time login (opens browser for GitHub authorization)</span>
oh auth copilot-login

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Then launch with Copilot as the provider</span>
uv run oh --api-format copilot

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Or via environment variable</span>
<span class="pl-k">export</span> OPENHARNESS_API_FORMAT=copilot
uv run oh

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Check auth status</span>
oh auth status

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Remove stored credentials</span>
oh auth copilot-logout</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# One-time login (opens browser for GitHub authorization)
oh auth copilot-login

# Then launch with Copilot as the provider
uv run oh --api-format copilot

# Or via environment variable
export OPENHARNESS_API_FORMAT=copilot
uv run oh

# Check auth status
oh auth status

# Remove stored credentials
oh auth copilot-logout" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🏗️ Harness Architecture</h2><a id="user-content-️-harness-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🏗️ Harness Architecture" href="#️-harness-architecture"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">OpenHarness implements the core Agent Harness pattern with 10 subsystems:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>openharness/
  engine/          # 🧠 Agent Loop — query → stream → tool-call → loop
  tools/           # 🔧 43 Tools — file I/O, shell, search, web, MCP
  skills/          # 📚 Knowledge — on-demand skill loading (.md files)
  plugins/         # 🔌 Extensions — commands, hooks, agents, MCP servers
  permissions/     # 🛡️ Safety — multi-level modes, path rules, command deny
  hooks/           # ⚡ Lifecycle — PreToolUse/PostToolUse event hooks
  commands/        # 💬 54 Commands — /help, /commit, /plan, /resume, ...
  mcp/             # 🌐 MCP — Model Context Protocol client
  memory/          # 🧠 Memory — persistent cross-session knowledge
  tasks/           # 📋 Tasks — background task management
  coordinator/     # 🤝 Multi-Agent — subagent spawning, team coordination
  prompts/         # 📝 Context — system prompt assembly, CLAUDE.md, skills
  config/          # ⚙️ Settings — multi-layer config, migrations
  ui/              # 🖥️ React TUI — backend protocol + frontend
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="openharness/
  engine/          # 🧠 Agent Loop — query → stream → tool-call → loop
  tools/           # 🔧 43 Tools — file I/O, shell, search, web, MCP
  skills/          # 📚 Knowledge — on-demand skill loading (.md files)
  plugins/         # 🔌 Extensions — commands, hooks, agents, MCP servers
  permissions/     # 🛡️ Safety — multi-level modes, path rules, command deny
  hooks/           # ⚡ Lifecycle — PreToolUse/PostToolUse event hooks
  commands/        # 💬 54 Commands — /help, /commit, /plan, /resume, ...
  mcp/             # 🌐 MCP — Model Context Protocol client
  memory/          # 🧠 Memory — persistent cross-session knowledge
  tasks/           # 📋 Tasks — background task management
  coordinator/     # 🤝 Multi-Agent — subagent spawning, team coordination
  prompts/         # 📝 Context — system prompt assembly, CLAUDE.md, skills
  config/          # ⚙️ Settings — multi-layer config, migrations
  ui/              # 🖥️ React TUI — backend protocol + frontend" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Agent Loop</h3><a id="user-content-the-agent-loop" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Agent Loop" href="#the-agent-loop"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The heart of the harness. One loop, endlessly composable:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">while</span> <span class="pl-c1">True</span>:
    <span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">await</span> <span class="pl-s1">api</span>.<span class="pl-c1">stream</span>(<span class="pl-s1">messages</span>, <span class="pl-s1">tools</span>)
    
    <span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">stop_reason</span> <span class="pl-c1">!=</span> <span class="pl-s">"tool_use"</span>:
        <span class="pl-k">break</span>  <span class="pl-c"># Model is done</span>
    
    <span class="pl-k">for</span> <span class="pl-s1">tool_call</span> <span class="pl-c1">in</span> <span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">tool_uses</span>:
        <span class="pl-c"># Permission check → Hook → Execute → Hook → Result</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">result</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-k">await</span> <span class="pl-s1">harness</span>.<span class="pl-c1">execute_tool</span>(<span class="pl-s1">tool_call</span>)
    
    <span class="pl-s1">messages</span>.<span class="pl-c1">append</span>(<span class="pl-s1">tool_results</span>)
    <span class="pl-c"># Loop continues — model sees results, decides next action</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="while True:
    response = await api.stream(messages, tools)
    
    if response.stop_reason != "tool_use":
        break  # Model is done
    
    for tool_call in response.tool_uses:
        # Permission check → Hook → Execute → Hook → Result
        result = await harness.execute_tool(tool_call)
    
    messages.append(tool_results)
    # Loop continues — model sees results, decides next action" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">The model decides <strong>what</strong> to do. The harness handles <strong>how</strong> — safely, efficiently, with full observability.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Harness Flow</h3><a id="user-content-harness-flow" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Harness Flow" href="#harness-flow"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">Every tool has:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Pydantic input validation</strong> — structured, type-safe inputs</li>
<li><strong>Self-describing JSON Schema</strong> — models understand tools automatically</li>
<li><strong>Permission integration</strong> — checked before every execution</li>
<li><strong>Hook support</strong> — PreToolUse/PostToolUse lifecycle events</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤝 Ecosystem Workflows</h3><a id="user-content--ecosystem-workflows" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤝 Ecosystem Workflows" href="#-ecosystem-workflows"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">OpenHarness is useful as a lightweight harness layer around Claude-style tooling conventions:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>OpenClaw-oriented workflows</strong> can reuse Markdown-first knowledge and command-driven collaboration patterns.</li>
<li><strong>Claude-style plugins and skills</strong> stay portable because OpenHarness keeps those formats familiar.</li>
<li><strong>ClawTeam-style multi-agent work</strong> maps well onto the built-in team, task, and background execution primitives.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">For concrete usage ideas instead of generic claims, see <a href="/HKUDS/OpenHarness/blob/main/docs/SHOWCASE.md"><code>docs/SHOWCASE.md</code></a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🛡️ Permissions</h3><a id="user-content-️-permissions" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🛡️ Permissions" href="#️-permissions"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Multi-level safety with fine-grained control:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Mode</th>
<th>Behavior</th>
<th>Use Case</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Default</strong></td>
<td>Ask before write/execute</td>
<td>Daily development</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Auto</strong></td>
<td>Allow everything</td>
<td>Sandboxed environments</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Plan Mode</strong></td>
<td>Block all writes</td>
<td>Large refactors, review first</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Path-level rules</strong> in <code>settings.json</code>:</p>

    <span class="pl-ent">"path_rules"</span>: [{<span class="pl-ent">"pattern"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>/etc/*<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-ent">"allow"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">false</span>}],

  }
}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🖥️ Terminal UI</h3><a id="user-content-️-terminal-ui" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🖥️ Terminal UI" href="#️-terminal-ui"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">React/Ink TUI with full interactive experience:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Command picker</strong>: Type <code>/</code> → arrow keys to select → Enter</li>
<li><strong>Permission dialog</strong>: Interactive y/n with tool details</li>
<li><strong>Mode switcher</strong>: <code>/permissions</code> → select from list</li>
<li><strong>Session resume</strong>: <code>/resume</code> → pick from history</li>
<li><strong>Animated spinner</strong>: Real-time feedback during tool execution</li>
<li><strong>Keyboard shortcuts</strong>: Shown at the bottom, context-aware</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🧑‍💼 ohmo Personal Agent</h3><a id="user-content-‍-ohmo-personal-agent" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🧑‍💼 ohmo Personal Agent" href="#‍-ohmo-personal-agent"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><code>ohmo</code> is a personal-agent app built on top of OpenHarness. It is packaged alongside <code>oh</code>, with its own workspace and gateway:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Initialize personal workspace</span>
ohmo init

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Configure gateway channels and pick a provider profile</span>
ohmo config

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Run the personal agent</span>
ohmo

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Run the gateway in foreground</span>
ohmo gateway run

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Check or restart the gateway</span>
ohmo gateway status
ohmo gateway restart</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# Initialize personal workspace
ohmo init

# Configure gateway channels and pick a provider profile
ohmo config

# Run the personal agent
ohmo

# Run the gateway in foreground
ohmo gateway run

# Check or restart the gateway
ohmo gateway status
ohmo gateway restart" tabindex="0" role="button">
      <svg aria-hidden="true" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" data-view-component="true" class="octicon octicon-copy js-clipboard-copy-icon">

<p dir="auto">Key concepts:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>~/.ohmo/</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>personal workspace root</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>soul.md</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>long-term agent personality and behavior</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>identity.md</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>who <code>ohmo</code> is</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>user.md</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>user profile and preferences</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>BOOTSTRAP.md</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>first-run landing ritual</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>memory/</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>personal memory</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><code>gateway.json</code>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>selected provider profile and channel configuration</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><code>ohmo config</code> uses the same workflow language as <code>oh setup</code>, so you can point the personal-agent gateway at:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>Anthropic-Compatible API</code></li>
<li><code>Claude Subscription</code></li>
<li><code>OpenAI-Compatible API</code></li>
<li><code>Codex Subscription</code></li>
<li><code>GitHub Copilot</code></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><code>ohmo init</code> creates the home workspace once. After that, use <code>ohmo config</code> to update provider and channel settings; if the gateway is already running, the config flow can restart it for you.</p>
<p dir="auto">Currently <code>ohmo init</code> / <code>ohmo config</code> can guide channel setup for:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Telegram</li>
<li>Slack</li>
<li>Discord</li>
<li>Feishu</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Add a Custom Tool</h3><a id="user-content-add-a-custom-tool" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Add a Custom Tool" href="#add-a-custom-tool"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">pydantic</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">BaseModel</span>, <span class="pl-v">Field</span>
<span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">openharness</span>.<span class="pl-s1">tools</span>.<span class="pl-s1">base</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">BaseTool</span>, <span class="pl-v">ToolExecutionContext</span>, <span class="pl-v">ToolResult</span>

<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-v">MyToolInput</span>(<span class="pl-v">BaseModel</span>):
    <span class="pl-s1">query</span>: <span class="pl-smi">str</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">Field</span>(<span class="pl-s1">description</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">"Search query"</span>)

<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-v">MyTool</span>(<span class="pl-v">BaseTool</span>):
    <span class="pl-s1">name</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"my_tool"</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">description</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"Does something useful"</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">input_model</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-v">MyToolInput</span>

    <span class="pl-k">async</span> <span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">execute</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>, <span class="pl-s1">arguments</span>: <span class="pl-smi">MyToolInput</span>, <span class="pl-s1">context</span>: <span class="pl-smi">ToolExecutionContext</span>) <span class="pl-c1">-></span> <span class="pl-smi">ToolResult</span>:
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-en">ToolResult</span>(<span class="pl-s1">output</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">f"Result for: <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-s1">arguments</span>.<span class="pl-c1">query</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>"</span>)</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from openharness.tools.base import BaseTool, ToolExecutionContext, ToolResult

class MyToolInput(BaseModel):
    query: str = Field(description="Search query")

class MyTool(BaseTool):
    name = "my_tool"
    description = "Does something useful"
    input_model = MyToolInput

    async def execute(self, arguments: MyToolInput, context: ToolExecutionContext) -> ToolResult:
        return ToolResult(output=f"Result for: {arguments.query}")" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Create <code>~/.openharness/skills/my-skill.md</code>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-text-md notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-s">---</span>
<span class="pl-ent">name</span>: <span class="pl-s">my-skill</span>
<span class="pl-ent">description</span>: <span class="pl-s">Expert guidance for my specific domain</span>
<span class="pl-s">---</span>

<span class="pl-mh"># <span class="pl-en">My Skill</span></span>

<span class="pl-mh">## <span class="pl-en">When to use</span></span>
Use when the user asks about <span class="pl-s">[</span>your domain<span class="pl-s">]</span>.

<span class="pl-mh">## <span class="pl-en">Workflow</span></span>
<span class="pl-s">1</span><span class="pl-v">.</span> Step one
<span class="pl-s">2</span><span class="pl-v">.</span> Step two
...</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

## Workflow

2. Step two
..." tabindex="0" role="button">

}</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">Add commands in <code>commands/*.md</code>, hooks in <code>hooks/hooks.json</code>, agents in <code>agents/*.md</code>.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🌍 Showcase</h2><a id="user-content--showcase" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🌍 Showcase" href="#-showcase"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">OpenHarness is most useful when treated as a small, inspectable harness you can adapt to a real workflow:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Repo coding assistant</strong> for reading code, patching files, and running checks locally.</li>
<li><strong>Headless scripting tool</strong> for <code>json</code> and <code>stream-json</code> output in automation flows.</li>
<li><strong>Plugin and skill testbed</strong> for experimenting with Claude-style extensions.</li>
<li><strong>Multi-agent prototype harness</strong> for task delegation and background execution.</li>
<li><strong>Provider comparison sandbox</strong> across Anthropic-compatible backends.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">See <a href="/HKUDS/OpenHarness/blob/main/docs/SHOWCASE.md"><code>docs/SHOWCASE.md</code></a> for short, reproducible examples.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤝 Contributing</h2><a id="user-content--contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤝 Contributing" href="#-contributing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">OpenHarness is a <strong>community-driven research project</strong>. We welcome contributions in:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Area</th>
<th>Examples</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Tools</strong></td>
<td>New tool implementations for specific domains</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Skills</strong></td>
<td>Domain knowledge <code>.md</code> files (finance, science, DevOps...)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Plugins</strong></td>
<td>Workflow plugins with commands, hooks, agents</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Providers</strong></td>
<td>Support for more LLM backends (OpenAI, Ollama, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Multi-Agent</strong></td>
<td>Coordination protocols, team patterns</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Testing</strong></td>
<td>E2E scenarios, edge cases, benchmarks</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Documentation</strong></td>
<td>Architecture guides, tutorials, translations</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
